name: setflow
description: SETFLOW — AI DJ Set Architect. Intent in, verified set out.

scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
